zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理格局
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD处于窄幅震荡偏弱结构，价格围绕1664附近运行，整体波动收敛，市场动能不足。多空双方持续拉锯，短线缺乏明确方向，行情更多表现为低波动整理状态，趋势延续性较弱。

从指标来看，价格持续运行在SMA20均线下方，均线系统形成短线压制。MACD维持负值并未出现明显修复动能，空头动能略占优势。尽管RSI缺失，但结合价格结构判断，买盘跟进意愿偏弱。

支撑位方面，下方重点关注1660一线，若失守可能进一步下探1650区域形成新的震荡区间。上方阻力集中在1668至1675区间，对应均线与前期密集成交区域，突破难度较高。

交易策略上建议维持区间思路，高抛低吸为主，避免追单操作。在未出现放量突破前保持谨慎，严格控制杠杆与止损，等待方向明确后再顺势跟随趋势进行布局。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ETH/USD is currently trading in a very tight consolidation around 1664, showing extremely low intraday volatility with a high-low range compressed between 1666.23 and 1663.95. Price action sits slightly below the 20-period SMA at 1667.95, suggesting mild bearish pressure within an otherwise sideways structure. The broader short-term trend remains neutral, but momentum has softened after failing to sustain levels above 1667. bullish continuation currently.

Momentum indicators reinforce a weakening bias, with MACD registering -0.326, indicating bearish momentum is present but not strongly accelerating. The absence of a visible signal line reading suggests limited confirmation, pointing instead to choppy momentum conditions. Price behavior near equilibrium levels implies buyers and sellers are balanced, though the slight MACD divergence favors downside pressure unless a recovery above the SMA quickly emerges.

Immediate support is forming around 1663.95, aligned with the recent intraday low, while a breakdown could expose the 1655 region as the next downside target. On the upside, initial resistance sits at 1667.95, corresponding to the 20-period SMA, followed by a stronger barrier near 1675. A decisive break above resistance would be required to shift structure back toward bullish continuation.

Given the compressed range and lack of directional momentum, short-term traders may prefer range-bound strategies, buying near support and selling into resistance. However, breakout confirmation is essential before committing to trend trades. Risk management remains critical due to the possibility of sudden volatility expansion after prolonged consolidation, which often precedes larger directional moves in either direction. Waiting for RSI confirmation or volume expansion is advisable.
